name: server
description: Backend for pigfarm Telegram Mini App

scripts.build: cd ../client && npm run build && cd ../server && tsc && npx shx cp src/db/schema.sql dist/db/
scripts.build:deploy: cd ../client && npm install && npx vite build && cd ../server && npx shx rm -rf public && npx shx cp -r ../client/dist public/ && tsc && npx shx cp src/db/schema.sql dist/db/
